description: Letter sent from Alexandria by a father (Manṣūr b. Sālim) to his son, who had run away to the army, trying to bring him back. (Information from Goitein's index cards)
tags: Mansur b. Salim, illness letter 969-1517, Illness, Illness: women's
description_he: מכתב שנשלח מאלכסנדריה מאב (מנצור ב' סאלם) לבנו שברח לצבא, בניסיון להחזירו.
